message:
feat: add feature option type validation and enum checking

Add ValidateAndProcessOptions method to validate feature options before
processing them into environment variables. Implements type checking for
string, boolean, and number types, plus enum validation for string
options with proposals arrays.

Validation rules:
- string type: value must be string, optionally in proposals array
- boolean type: value must be bool
- number type: value must be int, int64, or float64

Dockerfile generator now uses ValidateAndProcessOptions to catch
invalid option values early with clear error messages.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
